programme.desc: Sir David Attenborough, a legendary communicator and educator, has traveled the world for over six decades, inspiring millions with his captivating storytelling and bringing the natural world into our homes.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: With over 50 years in the industry, not many filmmakers can boast the longevity and influence of Steven Spielberg, whose journey from the suburbs of Arizona to the spotlight of Hollywood is one of the greatest stories ever told.

programme.title: The Moviemakers
programme.desc: 60 years since his directorial debut, Martin Scorsese's life has been dedicated to the past, present and future of cinema. Named Caretaker of Cinema, Martin Scorsese continues to push the boundaries of moviemaking.

programme.title: Aerial Italy
programme.desc: From the engineering wonders of ancient Rome to the bloody medieval battles of Tuscany, and the colossal marble quarries of Carrara, journey across Central Italy and discover it like never before - from the air.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: The Last Woodsmen (S2)
programme.desc: Stretched thin and desperately off-pace, Jared watches a loader tumble down the road. Foreman Brad attempts to land his plane in choppy weather.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S5)
programme.desc: Trapped on high ocean cliffs, Joe and Matt struggle to cross a volcanic island covered with jungle and water-filled canyons.

programme.title: Dual Survival (S4)
programme.desc: Lost on a perilous ridgeline at 15,000 feet above sea level, Joe and Matt are forced to descend slippery cliffs through extreme weather conditions.

programme.title: Otto Bulletproof - Facing The Unknown (S2)
programme.desc: Otto and Alex embark on a jungle expedition in Brazil. They aim to establish contact with the indigenous population in the Amazon rainforest.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S21)
programme.desc: Sig gambles on a risky trip to the far North but ends up with a major equipment failure. Plus, a gruesome injury hits a key crew member.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S21)
programme.desc: Keith and Jake defend their grounds from encroaching trawlers. Sig struggles to keep his vessel operational under the pressure of a looming offload.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S18)
programme.desc: Johnathan sets mile-deep pots and pulls up a mystery species. Jake’s niece gets injured on the Saga, and Clark takes the helm in Sig's wheelhouse.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S18)
programme.desc: Mandy’s shocking news forces Sig and Clark to reconsider their decision to keep fishing. Jake teams up with Rip but powerful Aleutian tidal currents cause crossed lines.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch (S18)
programme.desc: Johnathan risks losing his entire live catch when the Time Bandit ventures into fresh water. Josh experiments with glow sticks to attract crab at the darkest depths.

programme.desc: Otto explores the culture of the indigenous Yvyrhareta population. They prepare natural medicines and participate in the traditional fire dance.

programme.desc: Sig suffers a life-threatening event at sea. Keith’s future is in jeopardy at the hospital in anchorage while Monte loses steering in 20ft seas.

programme.desc: The fleet races to finish the first Opilio season in two years. Sig’s cardiac event at sea forces Clark Pederson into the captain’s chair.

programme.desc: Phil and Heather travel to Trinidad to investigate shadowy figures and evil spirits at a haunted plantation and abandoned leper colony island.

programme.title: Landline
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent Linton Besser brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Eat The Invaders
programme.desc: Tony Armstrong visits ground zero of the rabbit invasion, exploring why Australia abandoned a beloved cuisine and considers putting underground mutton back on the national menu.

programme.title: Grand Designs Australia
programme.desc: Above Tasmania's breathtaking Huon River, Dan Rawlins must overcome personal tragedy, and his own lack of building experience, to almost singlehandedly construct an off-grid home, made of hemp.

programme.title: Movin' To The Country
programme.desc: In Mooloolaba, Halina boards a 100-year-old ketch to join an Indigenous-owned eco tour company. In Rockhampton, Kristy meets two start-up entrepreneurs working with mastectomy clothing. Plus Craig gets into a seafood smokery.

programme.title: Winhanganha
programme.desc: WINHANGANHA is a journey of archival footage, sound, poetry and original composition examining how legacies of collection affect First Nations people and wider Australia. Told through the lens of Wiradjuri artist, Jazz Money.

programme.title: ABC News with Joe O'Brien
programme.desc: Joe O'Brien brings you a comprehensive summary of the day's events, with the latest breaking news, in depth coverage of the top stories, live crosses, interviews and explainers to bring you up to speed on what's going on.

programme.title: The Cook Up With Adam Liaw
programme.desc: It's NAIDOC Week on The Cook Up, and Warndu's Damien Coulthard, Haus of Dizzy's Kristy Dickinson and host Nornie Bero are making family pie.

programme.title: Play On
programme.desc: Migrant families and athletes of multicultural heritage are changing Australia's sporting culture. From social sport to elite athletes, Paul Kennedy examines how sport helps build community, identity and opportunity.

programme.title: That Pacific Sports Show
programme.desc: Join Tiana Penitani Gray and Sam Wykes for your weekly hit of Pacific joy, as they share inspiring stories and incredible sporting prowess of athletes with Pacific Island heritage, from Australia and around the world.

programme.title: ABC National News
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time for transparency and trust. ABC News brings you the day's top stories and latest news, with more reporters to tell you what's going on and why it matters. Presented by Joe O'Brien.

programme.desc: Georgina Banks travels to Bangka in Indonesia to uncover what happened to her great aunt, one of the 21 Australian WW2 nurses massacred there. New voices highlight the silencing of women's stories in our military history.

programme.title: News Breakfast
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. Melissa Mackay brings you the day's top stories and the latest news, with live crosses to reporters and guests plus sport with Catherine Murphy and weather with Nate Byrne.

programme.title: ABC News At Noon
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Rear Window
programme.desc: When professional photographer J.B. “Jeff” Jeffries is confined to a wheelchair, he becomes obsessed with watching the private dramas of his neighbours play out across the courtyard.

programme.title: Xanadu
programme.desc: Xanadu is a look at the future and a loving rememberance of the way things were in the heyday of Hollywood. Olivia Newton-John and Gene Kelly star in this mesmerising musical fantasy.

programme.title: Liar Liar
programme.desc: Jim Carrey stars as a fast-talking attorney and habitual liar who, forced by his son's birthday wish, must tell the truth for the next 24 hours.

programme.title: Beowulf
programme.desc: Beowulf, a Scandinavian hero, battles the monstrous Grendel to save the Danes in this epic adaptation of the classic Old English poem.

programme.title: Rob Roy
programme.desc: In 1713 Scotland, Rob Roy MacGregor is wronged by a nobleman and his nephew, becomes an outlaw in search of revenge while fleeing the Redcoats, and faces charges of being a Jacobite.

programme.title: The Matrix
programme.desc: When a beautiful stranger leads computer hacker Neo to a forbidding underworld, he discovers the shocking truth--the life he knows is the elaborate deception of an evil cyber-intelligence.

programme.title: Tremors
programme.desc: Kevin Bacon and Fred Ward are in a fight for their lives when they discover that their desolate town has been infested with gigantic man-eating creatures that live below the ground!

programme.title: The Demon Hunter's Romance - EP 2 无忧渡
programme.desc: In Guangping City, where humans and demons coexist, Ban Xia, a wealthy girl with the rare ability to see demons' true forms, is deemed delusional by her family. After exposing her cousin’s bride as a demon, she’s forced to flee and meets demon hunter Xuan Ye. He helps her see the hidden world more clearly and reveals not all demons are evil. As they investigate her father's mysterious death and other strange events, their bond deepens.

Baoyou's father faints and needs a heart surgery. During his stand-up gig, Haojian portrays his first love in a good light and his marriage in a bad one. Limin finally breaks down.

programme.title: No Other Way - EP 7 至死不渝
programme.desc: Beichen is arrested for stabbing Xinran, claiming she deceived him. They were dating online, but she blocked him when he asked to meet. Xinran denies knowing him and accepts Lu Yu’s confession, triggering the attack. Manning expresses feelings for Shuheng, worrying Keying. Police trace the IP to Xinran’s home, Xinran later admits to lying but the truth is her mother, Meijiao was the real catfish.

Safe for anyone above 4 yrs old and stop Excessive Hair Shedding in One Week! 一款天然有机的植物萃取养护头皮头发系统，有助于恢复头皮健康、抑制双氢睾酮（DHT），并激活休眠毛囊，让秀发显著加密更显丰盈。安全温和，4岁以上人群均可放心使用，助您在短短一周内有效减少过度掉发！
